# Dr. Arcanonn

First mentioned: **3301-05-04**  
Last mentioned: **3301-05-23**  
Total mentions: **4**

## Related


## Biography

Dr Arcanonn established the Canonn Interstellar Research Group as a collaborative effort to investigate the mysterious artefacts appearing across human space. In May 3301, after organising a system-wide hunt involving dozens of commanders, his team successfully recovered an Unknown Artefact from a Federal Navy convoy whose ships had been crippled by the object's radiation.

The artefact defied all analysis, resisting sampling attempts and damaging the systems of any ship that carried it. Frustrated by Federal reticence, Arcanonn issued a public challenge to President Halsey's administration: "On behalf of all humanity, my team and I demand answers. The potential repercussions of the Artefact's existence are staggering." His insistence on transparency helped establish the narrative of government cover-ups regarding alien technology and set the Canonn on its path as one of the galaxy's preeminent independent research organisations.
